trends.headline: The 192 MHz WCH CH32V205 RISC-V MCU offers a 480 Mbps USB 2.0 interface
trends.summary: WCH CH32V205 is a 32-bit RISC-V MCU clocked at up to 192 MHz with 32KB SRAM, 256KB flash, and a USB 2.0 high-speed Host/device interface with a 480 Mbps PHY.
